metrics.title: Lead time for changes
metrics.query: Deployments | where Environment == 'prod' | extend LeadTimeHours = datetime_diff('hour', DeployedAt, FirstCommitAt) | summarize percentile(LeadTimeHours, 50) by bin(DeployedAt, 1d)

metrics.title: Deployment frequency
metrics.query: Deployments | where Environment == 'prod' and Status == 'succeeded' | summarize Deploys = count() by bin(DeployedAt, 1d)

metrics.title: Change failure rate
metrics.query: Deployments | where Environment == 'prod' | summarize Failed = countif(CausedIncident == true), Total = count() by bin(DeployedAt, 1d) | extend FailureRate = 100.0 * Failed / Total

metrics.title: Time to restore service
metrics.query: Incidents | extend RestoreHours = datetime_diff('hour', ResolvedAt, DetectedAt) | summarize percentile(RestoreHours, 50) by bin(DetectedAt, 1d)
